vision.problem: Operations staff juggle five spreadsheets and a shared inbox to manage customer accounts; changes are untracked and errors surface days later.
vision.success:
Business users fully replace their current spreadsheet/manual workflow.
Support tickets reduced by 30%

decisions.title: Monolith over microservices
decisions.rationale: One small team; operational simplicity beats theoretical scale

claudeMd:
## Tech Stack
- Language: Python 3.12
- Framework: Django 5 + DRF
- Database: PostgreSQL 15
- Tasks: Celery + Redis

## Structure
- apps/<domain>/ - one Django app per domain
- Models, serializers, views per app

## Patterns
- Fat models, thin views
- DRF serializers for all I/O
- Migrations checked in

## Constraints
- No raw SQL unless justified
- Type hints on public functions
architectureStyle: Architecture: client–server full-stack web app (frontend + backend API + database).
platforms: Responsive web app — modern evergreen browsers.
operations: OLA: internal team response/handoff times underpinning the SLA.
teamSkills: Team context: small team or solo — favour simple, low-maintenance stacks; avoid single-person dependency.
budgetDirection: Budget: optimise Product-stage components — buy & configure proven products to deliver value.
deliveryGovernance: Approach: decisions recorded as ADRs in the repo.
testingStrategy: Testing: unit tests for core logic.
Testing: manual QA pass before release.
cicd: CI/CD: separate dev, staging & production environments.
deliveryContext: Context: brownfield — extend/modify an existing codebase.
risksAssumptions: Risk: knowledge concentrated in one person.
Risk: uncertain data quality or availability.
security: Security: TLS 1.2+ for all traffic; HSTS.
Security: least-privilege access; scoped roles & service accounts.
Security: tamper-evident audit log of sensitive actions.
Security: validate & sanitise all input at trust boundaries.
dataPrivacy: Data: identify & protect PII; minimise collection.
Data: automated backups + tested disaster recovery.
localization: i18n: single locale for now (English) — design strings to be externalisable later.
integrations: Consume a custom or internal API (define endpoints & auth).
apiDelivery: API is internal/private — not publicly exposed.
designNotes: Palette: professional blue on gray neutrals.
Use Ant Design components & patterns (data-dense enterprise UI).
Everything operable by keyboard; visible focus states.
Design empty, loading, and error states for every view.
